software_item.name: triage-ui
software_item.description: React/TypeScript frontend microfrontend providing the patient-facing interview UI for symptom triage. Presents questions to patients, collects symptom data through various input types, and submits answers to the interviewer backend.
software_item.safety_class_rationale: Software that can contribute to hazardous situations. This UI collects critical patient symptom data that influences clinical decision-making. Incorrect data entry or display could lead to wrong triage recommendations, but the UI itself does not make autonomous clinical decisions - it only collects and displays data. Human factors failures in this UI could contribute to patient harm.

hazard_contributions.description: Patient enters incorrect symptom data due to confusing UI
hazard_contributions.cause: Question text or input controls unclear, leading to patient misunderstanding what data is being requested
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Incorrect triage recommendation based on wrong symptom data, potentially delaying appropriate care

hazard_contributions.description: Patient skips critical question without realizing importance
hazard_contributions.cause: No validation preventing skipping of critical questions, skippable flag controlled by backend but not validated in UI
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Incomplete symptom data leading to inadequate triage assessment

hazard_contributions.description: Numeric input validation error not displayed clearly to patient
hazard_contributions.cause: Error messages for number inputs may not be sufficiently visible or understandable, min/max validation occurs but error display relies on user noticing error text
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient enters out-of-range values (e.g., impossible blood pressure, temperature) leading to incorrect clinical data

hazard_contributions.description: Patient accidentally navigates away losing all entered symptom data
hazard_contributions.cause: Browser back button or close attempt shows cancellation modal, but if user confirms, all unanswered questions are lost with no recovery mechanism
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient frustration leading to abandonment of triage, delayed care, or restarting with potentially different/inconsistent answers

hazard_contributions.description: File upload exceeds size limit but error not clearly communicated
hazard_contributions.cause: MAX_FILE_SIZE limit enforced (11MB) with error reported to host, but user may not see clear actionable error message
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient cannot upload required medical images (skin lesions, wounds), leading to incomplete assessment

hazard_contributions.description: Free text input truncated silently without warning
hazard_contributions.cause: MAX_INPUT_LENGTH of 500 characters enforced on textarea, but no indication of character limit or warning when approaching limit
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient's symptom description cut off mid-sentence, losing critical context for clinician assessment

hazard_contributions.description: Network error during answer submission causes data loss
hazard_contributions.cause: handleNext submits answer but if network fails, error is logged but current answer may be lost, no automatic retry mechanism visible in QuestionsProvider
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient must re-enter answer, potential for different answer on retry, or interview abandonment

hazard_contributions.description: UI crash/error leaves patient unable to complete interview
hazard_contributions.cause: ErrorHandlerProvider catches errors but throws them to host application, potentially unmounting entire UI without recovery
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient cannot complete triage, forced to restart or seek alternative care pathway

hazard_contributions.description: Image file uploaded without EXIF orientation correction
hazard_contributions.cause: Image transformation uses fitImage but EXIF orientation handling unclear, could lead to upside-down or rotated images
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Clinician views rotated medical image (e.g., skin lesion), potentially misinterpreting visual symptoms

hazard_contributions.description: Multiple choice 'None' option not mutually exclusive with other selections
hazard_contributions.cause: handleNone utility processes 'None' option but logic in QuestionMultipleChoice may not clearly prevent selecting 'None' with other options
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Contradictory symptom data (e.g., 'no symptoms' and 'severe pain' both selected) leading to assessment confusion

hazard_contributions.description: Origin config fetch failure prevents interview from loading
hazard_contributions.cause: fetchOriginConfig failure in TriageUIProviders causes error but may not provide clear recovery path for patient
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient cannot start interview, forced to use alternative access method or abandon triage attempt

hazard_contributions.description: Text validation only checks trim() but not content quality
hazard_contributions.cause: questionProcessOut only validates text has content after trimming, but allows whitespace-only or nonsensical input
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient submits empty or meaningless text, clinician receives no useful symptom description

risk_controls_implemented.description: Numeric input validation with min/max constraints
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: InputNumber enforces min/max attributes and validates on input, displays error messages for out-of-range values
MAX_FILE_SIZE constant (11MB) enforced in QuestionFile before upload, rejects oversized files
MAX_INPUT_LENGTH (500 chars) enforced via textarea maxLength attribute

verification_evidence.test_function: HTML maxLength attribute provides browser-level enforcement

risk_controls_implemented.description: Exit warning modal to prevent accidental data loss
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: Browser history blocker triggers CancellationModal on back button or close attempt

risk_controls_implemented.description: Error logging and reporting to host application
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: ErrorHandlerProvider intercepts axios errors and React errors, logs to analytics and reports to host via reportErrorToHost callback

risk_controls_implemented.description: Image resizing to prevent upload failures
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: fitImage transforms images to max 2000px before upload, reducing file size

risk_controls_implemented.description: Answer status tracking prevents premature progression
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: isReadyToProceed checks if current question is answered or skippable before allowing Next button

risk_controls_implemented.description: Keyboard input sanitization for number fields
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: handleKeyDown prevents entry of exponential notation (e) and plus sign in numeric inputs

risk_controls_implemented.description: Loading state prevents duplicate answer submissions
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: setIsLoading flag prevents multiple simultaneous handleNext calls during answer submission

risk_controls_implemented.description: ARIA attributes for accessibility and error indication
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: aria-invalid, aria-describedby attributes on inputs provide screen reader feedback for errors

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Patient training and clear instructions before starting triage
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: UI cannot force patient to read instructions or understand medical terminology - requires system-level patient education

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Clinician review process to catch incomplete or suspicious symptom data
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: UI cannot validate quality or truthfulness of patient-entered data - requires human clinical review
UI cannot control network availability or implement retry strategies beyond basic error handling

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Session persistence and interview recovery mechanism
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: UI displays data from backend but does not implement persistent storage - requires backend interview state management

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Question design review and usability testing
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: UI renders questions provided by backend - question clarity and medical appropriateness must be validated at content level

failure_modes.name: Patient selects wrong answer option
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Wrong answer stored in questionsStorage, submitted to backend on Next
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage engine receives incorrect symptom data, may produce inappropriate triage recommendation
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No automatic detection - relies on patient reviewing answer overview or clinician review
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient can navigate back to change answer, or clinician can override during review

failure_modes.name: Input field unclear or confusing to patient
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Patient hesitates, enters incorrect data, or abandons interview
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Incomplete triage, patient seeks alternative care pathway, or receives wrong recommendation
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Analytics may show high abandonment rates, but no real-time detection
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient can close interview and restart, or contact support

failure_modes.name: React component throws unhandled exception
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: ErrorHandlerProvider.componentDidCatch invoked, error logged and re-thrown
failure_modes.effect_on_system: UI unmounts, patient sees error screen from host application, interview lost
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Error boundary catches error, logs to analytics
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient must restart interview from beginning

failure_modes.name: Network request timeout during answer submission
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Axios timeout error caught in try-catch, error reported to host, loading state cleared
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Answer not saved to backend, patient may not realize submission failed, interview state inconsistent
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Axios interceptor logs timeout errors, error analytics captured
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient must re-submit answer, but UI does not automatically prompt retry

failure_modes.name: Image file exceeds maximum size
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: File rejected, error message sent to reportErrorToHost, file value set to null
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient cannot upload required medical image, may abandon triage or proceed without image
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient must resize image externally and re-upload, or skip image upload

failure_modes.name: Origin configuration fetch fails on startup
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: fetchOriginConfig throws error, origin state remains undefined, UI renders null
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Interview cannot start, patient blocked from completing triage
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Error logged to analytics, error reported to host
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient must refresh page and retry, no automatic retry mechanism

failure_modes.name: Patient enters non-numeric characters in number field
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: HTML5 number input prevents most non-numeric input, but parseFloat returns NaN which becomes undefined
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Question marked as unanswered, patient cannot proceed until valid number entered
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient must enter valid numeric value, error message displayed

failure_modes.name: Patient accidentally navigates back during interview
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: History blocker detects POP action, displays CancellationModal
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Interview paused, patient can cancel or confirm exit, potential data loss if confirmed
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Browser history API detects navigation attempt
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Modal allows patient to cancel navigation and continue interview

failure_modes.name: Free text input exceeds character limit
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Textarea maxLength attribute prevents input beyond 500 characters
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient symptom description truncated, potentially losing important clinical context
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Patient must condense description, no overflow indication or guidance provided

failure_modes.name: Multiple incompatible symptoms selected together
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: All selected values stored in array, handleNone processes 'None' option but may not prevent conflicts
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Contradictory symptom data sent to triage engine, may confuse clinical assessment
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No validation for incompatible selection combinations
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Backend or clinician review must catch contradictions, patient can edit via back navigation

failure_modes.name: Image uploaded with wrong orientation
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: fitImage resizes image but EXIF orientation handling unclear
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Clinician views rotated medical image, potential misinterpretation of visual symptoms
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No automated detection of orientation issues
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Clinician must mentally rotate image or request re-upload, patient may not realize issue

failure_modes.name: Blank text answer submitted
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Validation checks value.trim() but may accept whitespace-only strings
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Clinician receives empty symptom description, missing critical patient context
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Backend validation required, UI only checks for non-empty trimmed string
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Clinician must contact patient for clarification, or patient can edit via back navigation

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: If submission fails, patient answer is lost unless retry mechanism exists. Network failures could result in incomplete symptom data reaching triage engine.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Error caught in QuestionsProvider try-catch, logged to analytics, error reported to host. No automatic retry. Loading state cleared allowing patient to manually retry.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.retry_policy: No automatic retry implemented in UI

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: If interview data fetch fails or returns stale data, patient may see incorrect questions or lose progress. Critical for interview state synchronization.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: loadInterview called after answer submission. Failure would be caught by QuestionsProvider error handling. Initial load failure handled in InterviewProvider.

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: If config fetch fails, entire UI cannot initialize. Patient blocked from starting interview. Config includes translations, theme, and customizations that affect usability.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Error caught in TriageUIProviders loader, logged to analytics, error reported to host. UI renders null if origin undefined.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.retry_policy: No automatic retry, patient must refresh page

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: If file upload fails, medical images (skin lesions, wounds, etc.) not available for clinical assessment. May delay diagnosis or require patient re-upload.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: saveQuestionAttachmentFile called from questionProcessOut. Failure would bubble up to QuestionsProvider handleNext error handler.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.timeout: Axios default timeout - may be too short for large images on slow connections

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: If error reporting callback fails or is not properly implemented by host, errors may go undetected. Patient could experience failures without support team awareness.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: reportErrorToHost is callback provided by host application. No fallback if callback fails or is undefined (uses defaultErrorReporter).

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Analytics failures do not directly impact patient safety, but loss of error tracking reduces ability to detect and fix safety issues.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Axios interceptor explicitly filters out analytics request errors to prevent infinite error loops. Analytics failures do not propagate to patient.

verification_gaps.description: No visible unit tests for text input character limit enforcement
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add unit tests verifying InputText respects maxLength and handles truncation gracefully

verification_gaps.description: Network retry behavior not tested, timeout handling unclear
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests simulating network failures and timeouts, verify error messages reach patient

verification_gaps.description: Image orientation handling not verified, EXIF processing unclear
verification_gaps.recommendation: Test fitImage function with images of various EXIF orientations, verify correct display

verification_gaps.description: Multiple choice 'None' mutual exclusivity not explicitly tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add unit tests for handleNone utility, verify 'None' deselects other options and vice versa

verification_gaps.description: Origin config fetch failure recovery not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration test for config fetch failure, verify patient sees clear error and guidance

verification_gaps.description: File upload size limit error messaging not verified from patient perspective
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add UI test verifying patient sees clear, actionable error when file exceeds 11MB limit

verification_gaps.description: Numeric validation error message clarity not tested with actual patients
verification_gaps.recommendation: Conduct usability testing with patients to verify error messages for min/max/step violations are understandable

verification_gaps.description: Answer submission failure does not prompt patient to retry
verification_gaps.recommendation: Implement and test explicit retry UI when answer submission fails, verify patient understands they must click Next again

cross_item_interfaces: Interviewer V3 API (shared with interviewer4 backend)
Front Door API (shared with other UIs)
shared_hazards: Network communication failures affect all services
User error in data entry is risk across all user-facing components
Session loss/timeout affects patient-ui and triage-clinic-ui similarly
system_level_controls_needed: Backup communication channels for critical errors
Clinician review workflow to catch data quality issues
Patient education materials explaining interview process
Medical content review process for question clarity
